overall.description: A nighttime journey through open prairie in a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The camera follows a horse-drawn carriage with two occupants traveling along a dirt path, illuminated by the carriage lantern. The clip ends with the carriage losing control and crashing onto its side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt road at night

agents.ego_description: traveling steadily by horse-drawn carriage along a winding dirt path through open prairie, with the carriage lantern illuminating the way ahead

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the prairie grass
dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky
large rock outcroppings visible on the left horizon
sparse bushes and low vegetation lining the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a peaceful nighttime drive through open prairie. The horse-drawn carriage follows a dirt path illuminated by its own lantern, with distant mountains visible against the starry sky. Sparse vegetation lines the trail as the carriage maintains a steady pace through the wilderness.

events.description: carriage begins turning sharply off the established dirt path into rougher terrain

agents.ego_description: steering the carriage off the main trail, causing the vehicle to bounce and swerve through uneven grassland

entered.detail: tall prairie grass replacing the packed dirt surface

segments.scene_description: The carriage leaves the established trail and enters rougher grassland terrain. The vehicle begins to bounce and sway as it moves over uneven ground, kicking up dust in the lantern light. The driver appears to be losing control as the carriage veers off course.

events.description: carriage hits an obstacle or uneven ground and begins tipping onto its side
carriage crashes completely, landing on its side with the wheels in the air

agents.ego_description: the carriage crashes and tips over, throwing the occupants and coming to rest on its side

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing and observing the crash from the hillside

segments.scene_description: The carriage loses balance and crashes dramatically, tipping onto its side and sliding to a stop. The horse appears to have tripped or stumbled, causing the vehicle to overturn. In the final moments, a distant figure can be seen standing on a hillside to the right, witnessing the accident.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transforms a peaceful nighttime journey through the prairie into a chaotic vehicular accident. It begins with a horse-drawn carriage gliding steadily along a dirt path, illuminated by a lantern against a backdrop of sparse vegetation and distant mountains under a starry sky. As the carriage veers off the established trail, the scene shifts to rougher grassland where the vehicle begins to bounce and sway violently over uneven ground, kicking up clouds of dust. This instability culminates as the horse stumbles, causing the carriage to lose balance and crash dramatically onto its side. The camera finally settles on the wreckage as a distant figure stands motionless on a hillside to the right, witnessing the aftermath.
